Experience luxury, performance, and versatility like never before with this 2022 Formula 380 Super Sport Crossover. Powered by triple Mercury Racing 450R outboards with joystick piloting, this high-performance crossover delivers effortless handling, incredible stability, and exhilarating speed. Every inch of this Formula is designed for the ultimate on-water lifestyle — from elegant styling to premium comfort features and cutting-edge technology.
